results.title: Brent’s Pick: Small Batch vs. Small Batch Select | Four Roses
results.description: Both of these Bourbons—each a combination of six and seven-year-old barrels—are balanced, mellow and complex. However, I’d say that Small Batch is fruitier, with a rounded, mellow mouth feel.
